# Vibe Browser - AI Web Agent & Agentic Operations

> Vibe Browser is an AI-powered browser co-pilot that lets users control any website with natural language. It also offers Agentic Team, a multi-agent AI system for autonomous SaaS operations.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.vibebrowser.app/): Vibe Browser product page. AI web agent that automates browser tasks using natural language.
- [Teams](https://www.vibebrowser.app/teams): Vibe Browser for Teams. Shared AI automation with workflow sharing, admin controls, and unified billing.
- [Agentic Team](https://www.vibebrowser.app/agentic-team): Deploy 5 specialized AI agents (Support, Engineering, Release, Product, Marketing) that coordinate autonomously over Slack to run SaaS operations 24/7. Powered by OpenClaw.
- [MCP](https://www.vibebrowser.app/mcp): Model Context Protocol integration. Connect Vibe Browser to AI coding agents like Claude, Cursor, and Windsurf.
- [Enterprise](https://www.vibebrowser.app/enterprise): Enterprise-grade AI browser with TEE-based security, SOC 2 compliance, and self-hosted deployment.
- [Use Cases](https://www.vibebrowser.app/use-cases): Real-world automation stories including financial research, legal research, and recruiter workflows.
- [Compare](https://www.vibebrowser.app/compare): Feature comparison between Vibe Browser and alternatives like ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Composite, and Strawberry Browser.
- [TEE Whitepaper](https://www.vibebrowser.app/tee): Open-source research on privacy-preserving LLM inference within Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) with Intel TDX and cryptographic remote attestation. Runs DeepSeek models on Azure Confidential VMs.
- [About Us](https://www.vibebrowser.app/aboutus): Meet the Vibe Technologies team building the AI browser co-pilot.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.vibebrowser.app/privacy): Vibe Browser privacy policy and data handling practices.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.vibebrowser.app/terms): Vibe Browser terms of service and usage agreement.

## Agentic Team

Vibe Agentic Team is a multi-agent AI system that deploys 5 specialized agents to autonomously run SaaS operations through natural Slack communication.

### The 5 Agents

1. **Grace (Support Engineer)** — Customer communication, Sentry monitoring, issue triage, email triage.
2. **Alex (Software Engineer)** — Bug fixes, feature implementation, code review, testing.
3. **Einstein (Release Engineer)** — Deployments, CI/CD, infrastructure, incident response.
4. **Jordan (Product Manager)** — Backlog management, PRDs, roadmap, stakeholder communication.
5. **Sam (Marketing Manager)** — Public announcements, social media, content creation.

### How It Works

Agents coordinate through Slack using a Thread-Based Subscription Model (TBSM). When one agent mentions another using @RoleName, the mentioned agent automatically subscribes to the thread and responds. This creates natural, traceable conversations that human teams can observe and intervene in.

### Key Capabilities

- Autonomous incident response and deployment
- Customer support triage and resolution
- Automated code review, testing, and deployment
- Product backlog management and PRDs
- Marketing content creation and announcements
- Kubernetes-native deployment
- Powered by OpenClaw agent framework
